summary: Iteration 7 - Bug Fix Testing Complete. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI bug fixes verified working: DELETE via dropdown (onSelect without window.confirm) on Collections, Projects, Inventory, Wishlist, and Content pages; Collection detail view with edit dialog for items; Tags page with tag detail view showing items grouped by source with edit dialog.
passed_tests: Backend: Auth login works (test_debug@test.com)
Backend: DELETE /api/collections/{id} returns 200
Backend: DELETE /api/projects/{id} returns 200
Backend: DELETE /api/inventory/{id} returns 200
Backend: DELETE /api/wishlist/{id} returns 200
Backend: DELETE /api/content/{id} returns 200
Backend: GET /api/tags/all returns tags with count and sources
Backend: GET /api/tags/{tag_name}/items returns items grouped by source (inventory, wishlist, content)
Backend: GET /api/collections/{id}/items returns inventory + wishlist items
Frontend: CollectionsPage - DELETE via dropdown works (onSelect, no window.confirm)
Frontend: ProjectsPage - DELETE via dropdown works (onSelect, no window.confirm)
Frontend: InventoryPage - Card click opens edit dialog with pre-filled data
Frontend: InventoryPage - DELETE via dropdown works
Frontend: WishlistPage - Card click opens edit dialog
Frontend: WishlistPage - DELETE via dropdown works
Frontend: ContentPage - Card click opens edit dialog
Frontend: ContentPage - DELETE via dropdown works
Frontend: ContentPage - Custom content type creation via input field
Frontend: CollectionsPage - Click on collection card shows detail view with Acquis/Souhaits sections
Frontend: CollectionsPage - Back button works in detail view
Frontend: TagsPage - Shows tags with count badges and source labels
Frontend: TagsPage - Source filter dropdown works
Frontend: TagsPage - Click on tag card shows tag detail view
Frontend: TagsPage - Tag detail view shows items grouped by source type (Inventaire, etc.)
Frontend: TagsPage - Click on item in tag detail opens edit dialog with ItemLinksManager
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 bug fixes verified working. Key fixes: 1) DropdownMenuItem using onSelect instead of onClick (Radix UI requirement) - verified on CollectionsPage, ProjectsPage, InventoryPage, WishlistPage, ContentPage. No more window.confirm blocking UI. 2) Collection detail view opens when clicking collection card, shows Acquis (inventory) and Souhaits (wishlist) sections - items can be clicked to open edit dialog. 3) TagsPage fully rewritten - tag cards show count and sources, clicking opens tag detail view with items grouped by source type (Inventaire, Souhaits, etc.), clicking items opens edit dialog with ItemLinksManager for cross-type linking.

dropdown_delete_onclick_vs_onselect.issue: DropdownMenuItem was using onClick instead of onSelect (Radix UI requirement)
dropdown_delete_onclick_vs_onselect.verification: All delete operations via dropdown menu work without UI blocking

window_confirm_removed.fix: Removed window.confirm, delete now triggers immediately via onSelect

collection_detail_view_edit_dialog.issue: Clicking items in collection detail view was navigating away instead of opening edit dialog
collection_detail_view_edit_dialog.fix: Added handleOpenItemDialog for inventory and wishlist items in collection detail view
collection_detail_view_edit_dialog.verification: Click on item card opens edit dialog with pre-filled data

tags_page_rewrite.fix: Full rewrite with tag detail view showing items grouped by source, edit dialog on item click
tags_page_rewrite.verification: Click tag card -> shows items grouped by source -> click item -> edit dialog opens

card_click_edit_dialog.inventory: ✓ Opens edit dialog with pre-filled data

collection_detail_view.access: ✓ Click collection card opens detail view

tags_page.tag_list: ✓ Shows tags with count and source badges
tags_page.tag_detail: ✓ Click tag shows items grouped by source
tags_page.item_edit: ✓ Click item in tag detail opens edit dialog with ItemLinksManager

custom_content_types.ui: ✓ Input field for new type (ex: podcast, article...) with + button
